content: {"id":"fb_1773744481466_l10wsq","signal":"positive","context":"Technical debt audit stayed stable by using a dedicated worktree, deleting tracked runtime caches, wiring new regression tests into npm test, and rerunning the full verification suite serially with captured evidence tails.","whatWentWrong":null,"whatToChange":null,"whatWorked":"Keeping verification serial avoided false negatives, removing tracked LanceDB artifacts aligned the repo with its local-only memory policy, and promoting new landing-page plus telemetry regressions into test:api prevented CI blind spots.","reasoning":null,"visualEvidence":null,"tags":["technical-debt","verification","git-hygiene","local-memory","test-coverage"],"skill":null,"rubric":{"rubricId":"default-v1","weightedScore":0,"failingCriteria":[],"failingGuardrails":[],"judgeDisagreements":[],"promotionEligible":true},"actionType":"store-learning","actionReason":null,"timestamp":"2026-03-17T10:48:01.466Z","richContext":{"domain":"testing","filePaths":[],"errorType":null,"outcomeCategory":"standard-success"}}
